text: The wood keeps its own secrets, and not all of them are trees.
The dragon hunters move through the gloom like race, their armor scuffed, their weapons stained.
They smell sickness, they smell opportunity.
Kalen's heart hammers against her ribs. Viridian cannot but he can barely stand.
She becomes a shadow guiding him from bolder to hollow,
praying the corrupted forest that seeks to drain him will also hide him,
from those who wish to spill his last drop of life.
